title: The Box
summary: Three weeks after her grandmother Adaeze's death, Kirin Saleh finds a hidden box in the linen closet containing a mysterious authentication key and a note. As a materials analyst, she recognizes that the object predates the Compact's systems. An archivist identifies it as a pre-Compact equity credential pointing to coordinates four hundred miles into the depopulated zone. Then Kirin finds the letters she can't read, and a photograph of a young Adaeze — radiant, unrecognizable — standing in front of a building that shouldn't exist.
themes: the lives we think we know
continuity_notes: Kirin has the key, the letters (unreadable), and the photograph. She's decided to go east. Tomas knows. Perun identified the Rootstock Protocol. Hasse has seen one of these keys before. The coordinates are 400 miles east in the depopulated zone.
